creator: thefloridaqueenie
caption:
Looking for things to do for Spring Break in Florida? Comment “Guide” and I’ll send you the link to my Florida map and guide with over 1,000 things to do and see around the state!

If you’re looking for something fun, colorful, and totally different while visiting St. Pete, you have to check out FloridaRAMA. This immersive art experience is like walking through a surreal, Florida-inspired dream world. Think glowing rooms, interactive exhibits, hidden doors, quirky Florida humor, and tons of photo-worthy moments.

Each room is created by local artists and inspired by Florida culture, nature, and nostalgia. You’ll find everything from neon mangroves and retro Florida vibes to unexpected installations that make you feel like you stepped into another universe. It’s fun for adults, families, and anyone who loves unique experiences (and great Instagram photos).

📍 FloridaRAMA
2606 Fairfield Ave S
St. Petersburg, FL 33712

⏰ Hours:
Typically open Thursday–Sunday (hours vary by day, so check before you go).

💵 Tickets:
Adults usually around $27, with discounts for kids and Florida residents.

Whether you’re visiting for Spring Break or you’re a local looking for something new to do, FloridaRAMA is one of the most unique attractions in St. Petersburg.

#springbreak #thingstodoinstpete #artinstallation #stpete #floridarama
